mapper.sql: id, project_id, runtime_type, operation_type, status, idempotency_key, message_id, correlation_id, agent_session_id, runtime_session_id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, resource_type, resource_id, command_json, ack_json, last_event_type, last_event_id, external_status, external_operation_id, error_code, error_message, deadline_at, started_at, completed_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO runtime_operation ( id, project_id, runtime_type, operation_type, status, idempotency_key, message_id, correlation_id, agent_session_id, runtime_session_id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, resource_type, resource_id, command_json, ack_json, last_event_type, last_event_id, external_status, external_operation_id, error_code, error_message, deadline_at, started_at, completed_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{projectId}, #{runtimeType}, #{operationType}, #{status}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{messageId}, #{correlationId}, #{agentSessionId}, #{runtimeSessionId}, #{workItemId}, #{workflowInstanceId}, #{workflowNodeInstanceId}, #{resourceType}, #{resourceId}, #{commandJson}, #{ackJson}, #{lastEventType}, #{lastEventId}, #{externalStatus}, #{externalOperationId}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{deadlineAt}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM runtime_operation WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM runtime_operation WHERE status IN ('CREATED', 'DISPATCHING', 'ACCEPTED', 'IN_PROGRESS') AND deadline_at < #{now} ORDER BY deadline_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE runtime_operation SET status = #{status}, idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey}, message_id = #{messageId}, correlation_id = #{correlationId}, agent_session_id = #{agentSessionId}, runtime_session_id = #{runtimeSessionId}, work_item_id = #{workItemId}, workflow_instance_id = #{workflowInstanceId}, workflow_node_instance_id = #{workflowNodeInstanceId}, resource_type = #{resourceType}, resource_id = #{resourceId}, command_json = #{commandJson}, ack_json = #{ackJson}, last_event_type = #{lastEventType}, last_event_id = #{lastEventId}, external_status = #{externalStatus}, external_operation_id = #{externalOperationId}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, deadline_at = #{deadlineAt}, started_at = #{startedAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
